design_decisions.philosophy: ZeroMark AI is an authoritative, precision-focused B2B marketing engine. We are avoiding the standard 'soft UI' and 'AI gradients'. Instead, we embrace the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Content is stripped of decoration so the data, leads, and metrics take center stage. Every pixel must feel deliberate, rigid, and functional.
anti_patterns: No rounded, soft, friendly UI elements (no rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl)

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for data and paragraphs. Optical alignment over mathematical.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none).
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Rectangle, no border-radius. Primary uses #002EB8. Explicit hover states required (hover:bg-[#001A7A] hover:text-white).
surfaces_and_components.tables: Grid Borders pattern. Border-collapse style. Border-b on every row. No alternating row colors, pure white background.
surfaces_and_components.badges: Tiny, uppercase, wide letter spacing (tracking-[0.2em]). Solid colors (destructive, success, warning) with white text, or stark black-and-white.
surfaces_and_components.sidebar: Stark white background (bg-white) with sharp right border (border-r border-border), compact padding.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Inputs have 1px solid border, rounded-none, ring-0, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary.

interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Slight background darken or translate-y-[-2px] for interactive cards.
interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).
interactions.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

icons_library.usage: Use bold or regular weight depending on the text context. Avoid duotone for dashboards to maintain the Swiss aesthetic.

onboarding_bg.description: Abstract black and white geometric shapes and lines for login/onboarding split screen.

team_collaboration.description: Professional corporate team for profile or settings context.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.html or index.css.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn border radii. Modify tailwind.config.js to set --radius to 0px or 2px max.
Implement the Layout using a permanent sidebar navigation and a top header for breadcrumbs/user profile.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts; customize Shadcn components heavily to remove their Vercel-like soft aesthetics.
Replace standard 100% overlay layers with subtle bg-black/40 if placing text over images.
Every actionable button or link must have a stable data-testid for testing.
Ensure 'Approvals Queue' heavily uses the Swiss pattern with stark color-coded actions for Approve/Reject.
Implement Web Scraping Lead Import modal using a strict, minimal UI to emphasize the technical nature of the task.
